enter the customer ID\", image with text","cardFields":[{"name":"title","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Select an Option to Continue\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"required":true},{"name":"description","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false},{"name":"image","value":{"type":"String","mode":"script","value":"(function execute() { var url = gs.getProperty(\"glide.servlet.uri\"); return url + \"OIP (1)_1758479068139.jpg\";})()"},"required":true},{"name":"imageAlt","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false}],"id":"86f1afcc0d52401588f20d962145d3d3","name":"Customer
